title: Support Status
description: Describes the support lifecycle status for a stream/year combination. Indicates whether a stream is active, deprecated, or retired for a given financial year.

status.description: Support lifecycle status: active = fully supported; deprecated = still usable but will be removed; retired = no longer supported

deprecationMessage.description: Message explaining deprecation or retirement, including migration path if applicable

sunsetDate.description: ISO 8601 date when deprecated support ends

provenance.description: Provenance metadata for this status record
